summary: This document details the internal Quality Management System (QMS) protocol for evaluating and qualifying third-party suppliers. It specifies technical performance metrics for AI model providers, including uptime and latency targets for the company's patient-facing phone system. The checklist defines criticality assessment criteria based on safety, performance, and regulatory compliance impacts.
